raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS Zebaot
irr swehrejs un fazztis : Tee-
scham/ ta ka es eima dohmajs/
ta tas notiks/ un ka es tawa
Padehma to eimu nodohmajs /
ta tas pastahwehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka es Affuru manna
Semmê gribbu tadaufsht / un
winan us manneem Kalneem fa-
mihdiht. Ka winna Juhgs no
teem tohp atrauts/ un winna
Nasta no winnu Plezzahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis irr tas Padohms/
kas nodohmahts irr pahr wiſſu
to Setiti/ un Schi irr ta issteepa
Rohka pahr wiſſahm Tautahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS Zeba-
ot irr to nodohmajs/ kas tad to
isnihzinahs ? un winna Rohka
irr issteepa/ kas tad winnu no-
wehrsihs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ai Gadda/ kad tas
Kehninsch Akas no-
mitre/ tad notikke tchi
Nasta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne preezajees wiſſa tu
Wilisteru Semme/ ka ta Rihe-
ſte/ kas tevi fitte/ falausta irr.
Jo no tahs Tichuhſkas Saknes
natks weena Ohdse/ un winnas
Anglis buhs weens deggohts
ſtraididams Puhtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee wiſſubehdigee Nab-
bagi Pilnibu baudihs / un tee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waijadsigee apguſſees ar * Mee-
rn. Bet tawn Sakni nokau-
schu es zaur Baddu / un tawug
Atlikkuſchus kaufs winsch seinê.
* Itt ka Lohpi kad tee pee-ehduſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kanzeet juhs Wahrtis/
kleedstu Piussahts/ wiſſa Wili-
steru Semme irr iſkuffusi. Jo
no Seemeka Puhtes, nahk Duh-
mi/ un nekas irr weentulis win-
na Pułkôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ko tad buhs atbildeht
teem Lauschu Wehstneſcheem? Ka
tas KUNGS Zianu irr dibbinajs/
ka winna Lauschu Apbehdina-
tee tur warr Batwerumu atrast.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XVI. Nodalla.
Papreeſchſluddinaschana no tahs breeswigas
Jspohſſischanas tahs Moabiteru Semmes
zaur teem Affirexeem : 1. Ir weena Stah-
ſischana to leelo Behdu / kas pee tahdas
Jspohſſichanas tapê redsetas : 2. xc.
1.( Chi irr ) ta Nasta
pahr Moabu. Ara
Weekſch Moaba irr Nak-
ti pohſtita/ ta irr isdeldeta. Tee-
scham Kire eekſch Moaba irr
Nakti pohſtita/ winna irr isdel-
deta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna eet uß Baitu un
Dibonu pee teem Augſtumeem
raudaht pahr Nebu/ un pahr
Medbu eekſch Moaba kaukt. Us
wiſſahm winnu Galwahn irr
Pleikis/ ikatra Bahrdã irr no-
dsihta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Savâs Gelâs eet tee ar
Maisfeem apjoſſichees / faudês
Jumtôs un Zettôs wiſſi kanz/
un nokahpj raundadami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tik labbi Eſbons ka Cele-
D
ale
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
